title: Root Cause Analysis
description: Structured RCA output written by the analysis agent.

scope.description: phase = single failed phase RCA. systemic = cross-phase RCA spanning the full loop, dispatched when per-phase RCAs repeat their fingerprint.

fingerprint.description: Deterministic identifier of the RCA's diagnosis: sha256 of `root_cause_class + sorted(key_signal_names)`. Required when scope == "phase"; orchestrator uses this to detect repeated failures and escalate to systemic RCA.

root_cause_class.description: Coarse-grained category of the root cause (e.g., wrong_patch_target, dynamo_blocked, geak_measurement_bias, cache_warmup_artifact). Used together with key_signal_names to produce the fingerprint.

key_signal_names.description: Sorted list of the symbolic signal names (not values) the RCA depended on (e.g., ["counters_zero", "engine_init_clean"]). Used together with root_cause_class to produce the fingerprint.

terminal_action_systemic.description: Systemic-RCA-only field. continue = retry path remains valid; fallback = roll back to a named earlier phase; accept_finding = halt the loop and let report-generate close it out (orchestrator auto-enters budget_mode=diagnostic).

phase.description: Phase key that failed (for phase scope) or the phase the systemic RCA was triggered from (for systemic scope)

terminal_action.description: If set to stop_with_blocker, emit a pipeline blocker even if budget remains

evidence.description: Supporting evidence from logs, outputs, or artifacts

root_causes.description: Identified root causes with confidence levels

suggested_fallback_target.description: Phase key to fall back to, or null

retry_guidance.description: Freeform guidance for the retrying phase agent
